title: 荣誉附件正文｜LOA Combine（第7部分）
content:
.

Mid Term Report of the project (at D1/2), Final Report of the project (at D1) and Quadchart for the project (at D1) must be submitted to TL@SUTD. C-1 Circular – Temasek Lab Grants Date: April 2018 Appendix A-1 Guidelines for Fundable / Non-Fundable Expenses of Research Projects Even if the expenses are allowable as stated in this guideline, they are subject to approval from TL Director and DSO. Should there be any audit queries subsequently, PIs are accountable for the claims submitted and liable to repay any rejected claims. Should there be any services signed up for the project but not terminated when project ends, any subsequent charges will be borne by the PI. Type of Description Expenses EOM Related Expenses PI’s Expenditure Not allowable on Manpower (EOM) Cost EOM includes salaries, CPF and fringe benefits including medical, dental, contribution to welfare fund, bonuses, incentive payment etc. PI’s Summer Allowable Salary Cost Maximum of 1 month per PI per year for DIRP and TL direct projects. Subject to approval from TL Director. SEED projects do NOT allow PIs to draw summer salary. Salaries, CPF Allowable and Fringe Benefits - As part of overall compensation to employees provided such costs are including reasonable and incurred under formally established and consistently applied Medical, Dental, policies of the University. Contribution to Welfare Fund, The salaries offered to staff should be reasonable, in line with local market etc. (for Other benchmarks and comply with formal established pay scale of the University Research Staff, that is consistently applied regardless of the source of funds. excluding PI’s) Please refer to Office of Human Resources and Admin for the budget guidelines for Expenditure of Manpower (EOM). For employees who spend less than 100% of their time on the project, their salaries should be pro-rated/allocated accordingly. Final package and bonus/incentives are subject to TL Director’s Approval. Temasek Laboratories @ SUTD Page 1 Circular – Temasek Lab Grants Date: April 2018 Type of Description Expenses Bonus / Allowable Incentive Payments (for As part of a total compensation package, provided such payments are Other Research reasonable and are made according to a formal policy of the University that Staff, excluding is consistently applied regardless of the source of funds. PI’s) Final package and bonus/incentives are subject to TL Director’s Approval. Overtime Not allowable Sponsor TL Allowable researcher tuition fee for For full-time employees hired under TL project. It is only applicable to TL SUTD part time project instead of TL seed project. The sponsorship is only allowable during PhD/part time his/her employment under TL project. The fees follows the SUTD University master standard rate. Annual Leave Allowable For full-time employees. The no. of days of leave accorded to staff must be in accordance with formal policies of the University that is consistently applied regardless of the source of funds. For employees who spend less than 100% of their time on the project, their annual leave should be pro-rated/allocated accordingly Final package and bonus/incentives are subject to TL Director’s Approval.
